title: Principal Frontend Developer at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Frontend Developer at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Nagpur-based team.

About Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies:
Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Node.js

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Netsol Technologies Digital Technologies!
